title: TBCC FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK BAY COMMUNITY COLLEGE TBCC FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides canned and fresh foods, culturally familiar foods, pet food, and personal hygiene items, such as toilet paper, toothbrushes, and menstrual care products. All items are subject to availability. Donations of dry or canned goods, baby food or formula, animal food, clothing, diapers, and hygiene products are accepted. 4301 Third Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Food Pantry: Monday/Wednesday 2pm-6pm, Tuesday 2pm-5pm Donations: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm (503) 842-8222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-8222 TTY/TTD (503) 842-2467 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Food Pantry: Walk in, Library Room 106 Donations: Drop off, main campus 4301 Third Street Tillamook, Oregon 97141 FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Personal/Grooming Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Pet Food Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - TILLAMOOK BAY COMMUNITY COLLEGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK BAY COMMUNITY COLLEGE
